chunks.text: ORDER SHEET IN THE HIGH COURT OF SINDH, KARACHI Constitution Petition No. D- 6091 of 2024 ___________________________________________________________ Date Order with signature of Judge ___________________________________________________________ Priority. 1) For hearing of Misc. No. 26951/24. 2) For hearing of main case. -------------- 21.08.2025. Mr. Khalid Jawed Khan, Advocate for Petitioner. Mr. Faheem Raza, Advocate for Respondent. Mr. Khaleeq Ahmed, DAG. Mr. Zulfiqar Ali Syed, Commissioner MTO, Inland Revenue. ____________ In response to Order passed on 15.08.2025, learned Counsel for the department / Commissioner has filed statement along withdrawal letter dated 19.08.2025; whereby, the impugned notice has been withdrawn. The same is taken on record. The purpose of filing of this petition has been served. Accordingly, the same is disposed of with pending applications. CHIEF JUSTICE J U D G E Ayaz
